data_boundary: Real public web sources only. No broker account, paid feed, login-only page, token, or cookie was used.

facts: NYSE lists Friday, June 19, 2026 as the Juneteenth National Independence Day market holiday.
checks.paper_account_impact: No paper fills are allowed for 2026-06-19; ledger keeps a no_trade row.

facts: For Thursday, June 18, 2026, AP reported higher closes for the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite, Dow Jones Industrial Average, and Russell 2000.
The AP summary attributed the rebound to stocks recovering most of the prior session's decline, easing Treasury yields, and oil price movement after the US-Iran agreement.
checks.paper_account_impact: The Monday plan keeps broad ETF exposure only, with QQQ and IWM sized below SPY because the setup depends on risk-on continuation.

facts: The FOMC maintained the federal funds target range at 3.5% to 3.75% on June 17, 2026.
The statement kept inflation risk in focus by describing inflation as elevated relative to the 2% objective.
checks.paper_account_impact: No leverage, no options, and a TLT hedge remain appropriate until inflation and rate-risk signals improve.

facts: The May 2026 Employment Situation reported a 172,000 increase in total nonfarm payroll employment.
March and April payroll estimates were revised upward by a combined 93,000.
checks.paper_account_impact: Labor data still supports a soft-landing/risk-on case, but the Fed/inflation node prevents aggressive sizing.

facts: BLS schedules the June 2026 Employment Situation for Thursday, July 2, 2026 at 08:30 ET.
checks.paper_account_impact: The paper account must reduce new discretionary risk or explicitly revalidate exposure before the July 2 release.
